title: All of Modrinth
description: A Modpack combining all the major Mods Modrinth has to offer
body:
![Minecraft All of Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc7080b10ef0462936dba0564f90462be5bcc492.png)

**All of Modrinth** is a lightweight but feature-packed modpack built entirely from Modrinth’s best. No nonsense, no bloat — just a balanced mix of adventure, tech, and quality-of-life mods on NeoForge 1.21. Fast updates, smooth performance, and endless fun. Simple as that.

_We are in no way affiliated with or endorsed by Modrinth._
